title: fix agent output
description: The structured proposed fix a driven Norn agent returns for one finding. It proposes a concrete change; whether the change is applied/landed is a separate downstream step, so this stays a safe, reviewable artifact.

finding_id.description: The finding id this fix addresses (as a string).

addressed.description: True if the agent produced a concrete fix. False if the finding could not be actioned (e.g. already fixed in current code, or the cited claim did not hold) — explain in rationale.

summary.description: One-to-two sentence statement of what the fix does.

files_touched.description: Repo-relative paths the patch changes. Empty when addressed=false.

patch.description: The proposed change as a unified diff (or, if a diff is impractical, an unambiguous edit description with before/after anchors). Empty when addressed=false.

rationale.description: Why this change is correct and standards-compliant; for addressed=false, why no fix was made.

risk_notes.description: Blast radius, anything a reviewer should scrutinise, adjacent code that could be affected.

residual.description: What this fix deliberately does NOT cover — follow-ups the finding implies but this change leaves open.
